variants: Mira Khatri is an accomplished professional who holds a Jewelmist Diver Distinction, showcasing her expertise in aquatic gem recovery. A graduate of Celestial Academy of Arts, she has written insightful articles for the Glacier Fern Review, contributing to the field of artistic exploration. In addition to her professional pursuits, she serves as a Lantern Hollow Storytelling Ambassador, where she dedicates her time to community engagement and cultural storytelling. Fluent in Persian Farsi, Mira uses her linguistic skills to connect with diverse audiences and share her knowledge.

In her interactions, she often employs Persian Farsi, which further enhances her capability to relate to many individuals from different backgrounds.
